info.title: Poachy API Documentation
info.description: Multi-tenant POS and eCommerce Marketplace Platform API

post.description: Validate admin credentials and send OTP code to email. This is the first step of 2FA authentication.

message.example: OTP sent to your email. Please check and verify.

post.description: Verify the OTP code sent to email and complete authentication. Returns bearer token on success.
Request a new OTP code if the previous one expired or was lost. This invalidates any existing OTP.
Create a new admin or support user. Requires admin role.

role.description: User role: admin (full access) or support (limited access)

items.example: The email has already been taken.

post.description: Reset password for another admin user. Requires admin role. All existing tokens for the target admin will be revoked.

admin_id.description: ID of the admin user to reset

post.description: Logout current admin user by revoking the current access token.

get.description: Get details of the currently authenticated admin user.
Admin retrieves all business details awaiting approval
Admin retrieves all business details with optional filters

post.description: Admin approves a business details submission
Admin rejects a business details submission

get.description: Get paginated list of all tenants with their domains and business details.

post.description: Create a new tenant with domain(s). This will create the tenant database and assign domain(s).

items.example: This domain is already assigned to another tenant.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific tenant including domains and business details.

delete.description: Delete a tenant and all associated data including database. This action is irreversible.

get.description: Search tenants by domain name or business name.

post.description: Add an additional domain to an existing tenant.

delete.description: Delete a domain. Cannot delete the last domain of a tenant.

message.example: Cannot delete the last domain. A tenant must have at least one domain.

post.description: Admin creates the first user for a tenant (stored in tenant's database)
Login as a tenant user with email and password
Logout tenant user and revoke token
Update tenant user password (requires current password)

message.example: Password updated successfully. Please login again.

422.description: Validation error - incorrect current password or weak new password

get.description: Get current tenant's business details submission

post.description: Tenant submits comprehensive business details including logo, banner, and operational information for admin approval (stored in central DB)

business_description.example: Leading electronics retailer offering the latest gadgets, computers, and accessories with competitive prices and excellent customer service.

business_logo.description: Business logo image (JPEG, PNG, JPG, WEBP - Max 2MB)

business_banner.description: Business banner image (JPEG, PNG, JPG, WEBP - Max 5MB)

address.example: Westlands Mall, Ground Floor, Shop G12

operating_hours.description: Weekly operating hours with open/close times in HH:MM format

201.description: Business details submitted successfully and awaiting admin approval

message.example: Business details submitted successfully. Awaiting admin approval.

business_description.example: Leading electronics retailer offering the latest gadgets, computers, and accessories with competitive prices and excellent customer service.

address.example: Westlands Mall, Ground Floor, Shop G12

message.example: Business details already submitted. Please contact admin for updates.

422.description: Validation error - Invalid or missing required fields

business_name: The business name field is required.
business_logo: The business logo must be an image.
The business logo must not exceed 2MB.

get.description: Get all active business types with their categories for business details form
Get all active categories for a specific business type
Get all users in this tenant (owner/manager only)

post.description: Create new user with auto-generated password sent via email (owner/manager only)

201.description: User created successfully. Credentials sent to email.

delete.description: Delete user (owner only, cannot delete yourself or last owner)

400.description: Cannot delete yourself or last owner

post.description: Assign or change user role (owner only)

get.description: Get all roles with their permissions

roles.description: Array of role names assigned to the user

permissions.description: Array of permission names assigned to the user

sanctum.description: Laravel Sanctum token authentication. Enter your token in the format: Bearer {token}
sanctum.name: Authorization
